page: Google Cloud Platform x4-megamem-1920-metal is a bare-metal server instance belonging to the x4 server family. It features an x86_64 CPU architecture with 1920 dedicated virtual CPUs (vCPUs) and a total memory capacity of 32,768.0 GB. This configuration yields approximately 17.07 GB of RAM per core. The server does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, and it is provisioned with zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Operating as a dedicated bare-metal system, the instance provides direct hardware access without virtualization overhead. The absence of local storage means all storage operations must rely on network-attached storage options. While benchmark data is not available for this specific configuration, the hardware profile is defined by its massive memory footprint and high core count, which are designed to support large-scale in-memory computations.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, this server represents an extreme resource density tier, consolidating massive memory and compute resources into a single bare-metal boundary to reduce multi-node orchestration overhead. Appropriate workloads include large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, massive data warehousing, and memory-intensive enterprise applications that require a single-node architecture with up to 32 TB of RAM.
description: Google Cloud Platform x4-megamem-1920-metal is an x86_64 bare-metal server designed for massive memory-intensive workloads. It features 1920 dedicated vCPUs and 32,768.0 GB of RAM, providing 17.07 GB of memory per core. The instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, requiring network-attached storage for data persistence. Operating as a bare-metal system, it eliminates virtualization overhead to maximize resource access. This server is engineered for large-scale enterprise applications, in-memory databases, and massive data warehousing workloads that demand extreme memory capacity and high core counts within a single physical boundary.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform x4-megamem-1920-metal is a bare-metal server featuring 1920 dedicated vCPUs and 32,768 GB of RAM on an x86_64 architecture, designed for massive in-memory enterprise workloads.

tagline: An ultra-high-capacity bare-metal instance featuring nineteen hundred dedicated cores and thirty-two terabytes of memory for massive in-memory workloads.
